title: Measure DNA concentration
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"84lis","text":"Measure the DNA concentration and purity of the purified PCR product (SpyCatcher segment) to ensure it meets Sanger sequencing submission requirements, and dilute or concentrate as needed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7gko","text":"Purified PCR product (product purified in the previous step using a DNA purification kit)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"35c5l","text":"Nuclease-free water","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"624em","text":"70% ethanol and Kimwipes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mti1","text":"NanoDrop spectrophotometer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1if3s","text":"Pipettes and sterile tips","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Turn on the Nanodrop device and launch the software.
Pipette 2 µL of nuclease-free water onto the lower measurement pedestal.
Close the arm and click Blank to calibrate the background.
Using a clean pipette tip, pipette 2 µL of the purified PCR sample onto the lower pedestal.
Close the arm and click Measure .
ecord the following data: Concentration (ng/µL) — typically 10–20 ng/µL is required for sequencing. 260/280 ratio (purity) — should be approximately 1.8–2.0.
Clean both the upper and lower pedestals with 70% ethanol and a Kimwipe.
If the DNA concentration is too high (>100 ng/µL), dilute to 10–20 ng/µL using the following formula: V1​×C1​=V2​×C2​
Mix thoroughly and re-measure with the Nanodrop to confirm the correct concentration.
creator: igemnthuth
